questions: You mentioned that your pre-index similarity threshold of 0.75 was 'a guess set before the index existed' — what would you do differently now if you were writing that developer brief again, knowing what you know about empirical retrieval tuning?
Why did you decide to build separate vector and structured indexes instead of trying to make a single vector store work for both prose and tabular data?

The FLAG/HOLD interrupt system seems like it solves a real problem, but how did you arrive at the specific distinction between 'non-bypassable' and 'must acknowledge'? Did you consider other interrupt models before landing on these two?
